data.content:
Implementation plan
- Add a small shared display formatter for release versions that guarantees exactly one visible `v` prefix while preserving the underlying raw version string for comparison logic.
- Apply that formatter to all UI surfaces that render `latestVersion` or installed/latest version labels in the update UX, starting with `src/components/version-badge.tsx` and `src/components/app-header-parts.tsx`.
- Keep normalization at the presentation layer only; do not change `src/lib/release-version.ts`, because semver comparison already strips an optional prefix and release metadata should remain raw.
- Extend existing component tests so both `v0.6.2` and `0.6.2` inputs render `v0.6.2`, and explicitly cover the prior `vv0.6.2` regression in the badge CTA.

Files / tests
- `src/components/version-badge.tsx`
- `src/components/app-header-parts.tsx`
- optional shared helper in `src/lib/` or nearby component util file
- `src/components/__tests__/version-badge.test.ts`
- `src/components/__tests__/app-header-parts.test.ts`

Complexity / risks
- Low complexity. Main risk is fixing the badge CTA but missing another update surface that renders the same raw string.
